filings.extracted_text: Item 7. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations. The Company experienced strong demand for iPhone 16 and Apple Intelligence features. Services revenue grew 14% year-over-year driven by App Store and subscriptions. Gross margin expanded 80bps to 46.2% on favorable product mix. The Company returned $27B to shareholders via buybacks and dividends during the quarter. Looking ahead, management expects continued services growth and moderate hardware refresh cycles.

Item 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis. Q1 revenue reached $124B, up 4.5% YoY, led by iPhone strength in emerging markets. Services margins remained strong at 74%. The Company repurchased $20B of common stock during the quarter. Free cash flow of $36B supported continued capital return.

Apple announced Q1 FY26 financial results. Revenue of $124B, EPS of $2.40, up 7.1% YoY. CEO Tim Cook: 'We delivered record Q1 revenue driven by strong iPhone performance and continued services growth.'
Apple announced the appointment of a new Chief Financial Officer effective January 1, 2026.
